qa_pairs.question: What should I do if I cannot use `--genomicsdb-shared-posixfs-optimizations` or if I'm using GNU parallel with `GenomicsDBImport`?
qa_pairs.answer: If `--genomicsdb-shared-posixfs-optimizations` is not possible or if you are using GNU parallel to run multiple intervals at the same time, you should copy your database to `${SLURM_TMPDIR}` and run it from there.

qa_pairs.question: Why is it recommended to copy the database to `${SLURM_TMPDIR}` in certain scenarios?
qa_pairs.answer: It is recommended to copy your database to `${SLURM_TMPDIR}` because your IO operations might disrupt the filesystem.

qa_pairs.question: What are the advantages of using `${SLURM_TMPDIR}`?
qa_pairs.answer: `${SLURM_TMPDIR}` is not only faster because it is local storage, but its IO operations also would not affect other users.
